programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol
programme.desc: A compilation of the best cases investigated in 'Crime Patrol' showcases people from different walks of life falling victim to the vices of others or their own.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: The British officers follow Mansingh to Shirdi with the intention to arrest him. In the meantime, Sai offers to help Mansingh but Mansingh remains sceptical.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: Mansingh breaks down when he remembers the massacre of his community. In the meantime, the British officers frantically search for Mansingh.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: The residents of Shirdi face a lot of inconveniences when the British officers interfere. On the other hand, Mansingh gets into trouble because of his impulsive decisions.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: The youngsters of Shirdi express their disapproval of Mansingh's presence in their town. On the other hand, Kulkarni fumes with rage when the British officers refuse to listen to him.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: Contestants put their minds to solving word puzzles after spinning a giant wheel that determines the monetary value they are playing for.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal tries to impress Babita with his knowledge about foreign countries, but Daya ends up embarrassing him. Babita implores Iyer to buy a new fridge.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Babita and Iyer select a fridge for their house from Jethalal's shop. Jethalal begins to panic when Nattu Kaka accidentally sells the model to someone else.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal ends up with multiple pieces of the same refrigerator to please Babita. Iyer refuses to buy a refrigerator from him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is irked at Iyer over the refrigerator fiasco. Everyone looks forward to Diwali, and Tapu demands toys and clothes from Jethalal.

programme.title: Hui Gumm Yaadein Ek Doctor, Do Zindagiyaan
programme.desc: This is TV Show - Drama Category.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the burden of raising her five siblings amidst their father's alcoholism.

programme.title: Yeh Rishta Kya Kehlata Hai
programme.desc: Dr Abhimanyu, a misogamist, finds himself getting attracted to Akshara, Kartik and Naira's daughter. Things take a tricky turn when Akshara's half-sister, Arohi, falls in love with him.

programme.title: Tod Kar Dil Mera
programme.desc: Raushni supports her husband's dream of becoming an IAS officer. However, will a betrayal change her life and aspirations?

programme.title: Taara
programme.desc: Taara, a gifted singer, and Yuvraaj, a wealthy heir, are bound by deep love. However, as class and family honour collide, the couple must confront relentless opposition to keep their love alive.

programme.title: Advocate Anjali Awasthi
programme.desc: Anjali Awasthi is a lawyer that struggles to achieve recognition in her field. But this desire to be recognised leads her to take on a challenging case that could help her achieve her dreams.

programme.title: Mr & Mrs Parshuram
programme.desc: Shivprasad lives a quiet life as a devoted husband and father, but he harbors a massive secret. Unknown to his family, he is also Parshuram, a highly skilled spy on dangerous missions.

programme.title: Udne Ki Aasha
programme.desc: Though they get off to a bad start, an aspirational Saili and an unmotivated Sachin end up getting married. Saili then tries to turn her husband into a competent person.

programme.title: Tum Se Tum Tak
programme.desc: Anu thinks about her ring before seeing Aryavardhan, but Gayatri tells Jhende to keep them separated until Gopal and Pushpa come back. Meanwhile, at the temple, a mystery person helps out.

programme.title: Ganga Mai Ki Betiyaan
programme.desc: Sneha helps a nervous Ganga regain her confidence. Meanwhile, Vimla tries to gather evidence of Sneha and Siddhu's relationship.

programme.title: Saru
programme.desc: Urmila restarts Bhola's vengeance against Saru and instructs him to kill her at Tara and Ramesh's anniversary party. Later, Anika invites Rajat to the party to widen the discord between Saru and Ved.

programme.title: Lakshmi Nivas
programme.desc: A family drama exploring love, loyalty, and personal conflicts in a traditional household.

programme.title: Tum Se Tum Tak
programme.desc: Aryavardhan attempts to see Anu, and Mansi's opposition causes concern for Harshvardhan. Later, Raghupati schemes against Anu and Aryavardhan while Gopal and Pushpa look for the unknown individual.

programme.title: Ganga Mai Ki Betiyaan
programme.desc: Siddhu stands with Ganga before Bhaskar's review. Soon, berated for her lack of training, she rises to the occasion with Sneha's faith and Shantanu's counsel and impresses Bhaskar with exotic cuisine.
